assignments.name: Add_Assembly_To_varAssembliesToAttach_Variable
assignments.label: Add Assembly To varAssembliesToAttach Variable

assignments.name: Add_Asset_To_varAssetsToAttach_Variable
assignments.label: Add Asset To varAssetsToAttach Variable

assignments.description: Add to a collection so it can be used as an input variable on a sub-flow which prepares Assets On Ticket and Assembly On Ticket records for attachment to the sub-ticket
assignments.name: Add_Sub_Ticket_To_Create_To_Collection
assignments.label: Add Sub-Ticket To Create To Collection

assignments.label: Assign Commercial Queue Id To Variable

assignments.label: Assign Compliance Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Content_Document_Names_To_Collection
assignments.label: Assign Content Document Names To Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Credit_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Credit Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Current_Assembly_To_Placeholder_Collection
assignments.label: Assign Current Assembly To Placeholder Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Current_Asset_To_Placeholder
assignments.label: Assign Current Asset To Placeholder Collection

assignments.name: Assign_File_Input_Content_Document_Ids_To_Collection
assignments.label: Assign File Input Content Document Ids To Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_Values_Back_To_Variables
assignments.label: Assign Filtered Values Back To Variables

assignments.name: Assign_Finance_Queue_Id_to_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Finance Queue Id to Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Inherited_Assets_and_Assemblies_To_Variables
assignments.label: Assign Inherited Assets and Assemblies To Variables

assignments.name: Assign_Investment_Strategy_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Investment & Strategy Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Lease_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Lease Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Legal_Contracts_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Legal & Contracts Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Parent_Ticket_Values_To_SubTicket
assignments.label: Assign Parent Ticket Values To SubTicket

assignments.name: Assign_Portfolio_Fund_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Portfolio & Fund Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Technical_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Technical Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Ticket_Values_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Ticket Values To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Trading_Asset_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Trading & Asset Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Values_To_Content_Document_Link
assignments.label: Assign Values To Content Document Link

assignments.name: Clear_Variables_For_Ticket_Management_Screen
assignments.label: Clear Variables For Ticket Management Screen

assignments.description: Fill in a text collection variables with the Content Document Ids inherited from the main ticket, along with any extra content document ids that were added in.
assignments.name: Create_Collection_Of_All_Content_Document_Ids
assignments.label: Create Collection Of All Content Document Ids

assignments.description: If no new content document has been uploaded, create a collection of only inherited content document ids
assignments.name: Create_Collection_Of_Inherited_Content_Document_Ids
assignments.label: Create Collection Of Inherited Content Document Ids

assignments.name: Relate_Ticket_Assignee_to_SubTicket
assignments.label: Relate Ticket Assignee to SubTicket

assignments.name: Set_Non_Carlyle_Asset_on_Ticket_To_Create_Variable
assignments.label: Set Non Carlyle Asset on Ticket To Create Variable

assignments.name: Set_varAssembliesToAttach_To_Placeholder_Value
assignments.label: Set varAssembliesToAttach To Placeholder Value

assignments.name: Set_varAssetsToAttach_To_Values_In_Placeholder_Collection
assignments.label: Set varAssetsToAttach To Values In Placeholder Collection

decisions.description: If user entered a value in the Assigned To field on the Ticket creation screen, then create a Ticket Assignee record and relate to the new Sub-Ticket
decisions.name: Did_User_Assign_Ticket
decisions.label: Did User Assign Ticket?

decisions.description: Check to avoid adding duplicate assemblies to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
decisions.label: Is Assembly Already In Update List?

rules.name: Yes_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
rules.label: Yes - Assembly Already In Update List

decisions.description: Avoid the possibility of adding duplicate assets to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Asset_Already_Attached
decisions.label: Is Asset Already Attached?

decisions.description: Direct flow down a path based on button clicks in the Ticket Management Screen
decisions.name: Link_or_Remove_Links_To_Assets_or_Assemblies
decisions.label: Link or Remove Links To Assets or Assemblies?

decisions.description: If Asset's Id is in the list Create Assets To Remove Id Collection then it should not be added into placeholder collection
decisions.name: Remove_Current_Asset
decisions.label: Remove Current Asset

decisions.description: Manual navigation ensuring when a user clicks Previous, they are always returned to the Ticket Input Screen
decisions.name: Return_To_Previous_Screen
decisions.label: Return To Previous Screen

decisions.description: Check if an asset is to be linked before applying logic for linking Assets
decisions.name: Was_An_Asset_Selected_To_Be_Linked
decisions.label: Was An Asset Selected To Be Linked?

decisions.description: Check that there was a selection for assemblies before applying logic for adding to varAssembliesToAttach collection
decisions.name: Was_At_Least_1_Assembly_Selected
decisions.label: Was At Least 1 Assembly Selected?

decisions.description: If selected for removal, don't add to the placeholder collection
decisions.name: Was_Current_Assembly_Selected_For_Removal
decisions.label: Was Current Assembly Selected For Removal?

decisions.description: Check if Assemblies were selected for removal before applying logic to remove from varAssembliesToAttach
decisions.name: Were_Assemblies_Selected_For_Removal
decisions.label: Were Assemblies Selected For Removal?

decisions.description: Check if Assets were selected for removal before applying logic to remove from varAssetsToAttach
decisions.name: Were_Assets_Selected_For_Removal
decisions.label: Were Assets Selected For Removal

decisions.description: If new files were uploaded, add them to the collection of content document ids
decisions.name: Were_New_Files_Uploaded
decisions.label: Were New Files Uploaded?

formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "LIMIT 14",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "LIMIT 14" )

formulas.name: f_AssetInputInvalid
formulas.expression:
OR(
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = True, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset_MSN__c} != Null )
,
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} != Null, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = False
) )

formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c LIMIT 14", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' LIMIT 14" )

formulas.description: If Non Carlyle Asset is checked then return Non Carlyle Asset MSN, otherwise maintain Ticket value.
formulas.name: f_NonCarlyleMSNInputOrTriggeringTicketAssets

formulas.description: Formula returns the required Lease field value if the ticket Type is Lease Management. Otherwise, returns non required field value
formulas.name: f_RequiredOrNonRequiredLeaseField

formulas.description: If the Ticket type is Lease Management, this returns the value from the required Lease lookup field. For any other Ticket type, this returns the non required lease lookup field value.
formulas.name: f_StandardLeaseLookupOrRequiredLeaseLookup

Flow.interviewLabel: Prodigy - Screen - Create Subtickets Dynamic Linking {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Create Subtickets Dynamic Linking

loops.description: Loop through the Assemblies selected to be added through the Ticket Management Screen
loops.name: Loop_Assemblies_Selected_To_Add
loops.label: Loop Assemblies Selected To Add

recordLookups.name: Get_Assemblies_To_Be_Inherited_To_Sub_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Assemblies To Be Inherited To Sub-Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Assets_To_Be_Inherited_To_Sub_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Assets To Be Inherited To Sub-Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Document_Links_For_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Content Document Links For Main Ticket

recordUpdates.name: Update_Assets_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket
recordUpdates.label: Update Assets & Assemblies Fields On Ticket

fields.name: TicketCreationInputScreenTitle
fields.fieldText:
{!Select_a_Ticket_type}


Information

subflows.name: Prodigy_Auto_Prepare_Variables_To_Attach_Assets_Assemblies_To_Ticket_Flow_1
subflows.label: Prodigy - Auto - Prepare Variables To Attach Assets & Assemblies To Ticket Flow 1

variables.description: A collection of the Assemblies selected to be attached to the sub-ticket
variables.name: varAssembliesToAttach

variables.description: Used for building up list of assets minus those selected to be removed.
variables.name: varAssetsToAttachPlaceholder

variables.description: A collection of the Assets selected to be attached to the sub-ticket
variables.name: varAssetsToAttch

variables.description: A collection of the names of Content Document files to be uploaded.
variables.name: varContentDocumentNameCollection

variables.description: Placeholder variable allows for carrying over of Serial Number text input value between screen changes.
variables.name: varSerialNumberPlaceholder

variables.description: Variable for the creation of an assignee to be related to the new sub-ticket
variables.name: varTicketAssigneeToCreate
